questionHtml: Draw, on the axes, the variation with diffraction angle of the intensity of light incident on the retina of the observer.
markschemeHtml:
standard single slit diffraction pattern with correct overall shape ✔

secondary maxima of right size ✔

 

NOTE: Secondary maximum not to exceed 1/5th of maximum intensity

Ignore width of maxima

meta.title: Draw, on the axes, the variation with diffraction angle of the intensity of light incident on the retina of the observer.
